title: EU TARIC Customs Tariff API Research Findings
research_summary: Comprehensive research into programmatic access methods for EU TARIC (Tariff Integrated Computer Retrieval Application) 10-digit tariff codes for all 27 EU member states.

key_findings.taric_description: TARIC is the integrated tariff of the European Union - a multilingual database containing all measures relating to EU customs tariff, commercial and agricultural legislation. The database is unified across all 27 EU member states.

taric_code_structure.digits_9_to_10: TARIC subheadings - EU community measures (anti-dumping, quotas, suspensions, etc.)

key_findings.update_frequency: Daily - TARIC data is transmitted daily to all 27 EU member state national administrations
key_findings.total_codes_estimate: Approximately 15,000-20,000 unique 10-digit codes (research confirms this range)

endpoints.name: Search Tariffs

parameters.q: 6-10 digit tariff code or product description

endpoints.description: Search for tariffs using TARIC/HS code or product description. When 10-digit code provided, returns exact match first, then related codes by relevance.

endpoints.name: Validate Tariff
endpoints.description: Check if specific tariff code exists and is admissible. Returns 200 if valid, 404 if not.

authentication.note: Production key only after successful integration/testing

1_viaeurope_api.daily_sync: Yes - data synchronized daily with EU Customs database
1_viaeurope_api.advantage: Supports large-scale queries for bulk tariff code retrieval
1_viaeurope_api.limitation: Requires API key registration and potential integration agreement

capabilities: HS code validation with suggestions for incomplete codes
Duty and tax calculations for EU and Great Britain
VAT calculation for select member states
Additional codes for tariff preferences, restrictions, anti-dumping measures
2_taric_support_api.data_sync: TARIC codes synchronized daily with EU Customs database
2_taric_support_api.limitation: Commercial service - pricing and full API documentation require direct contact

3_api_store_eu_institutions.description: Provides access to EU open data via scalable REST API interface
3_api_store_eu_institutions.data_provider: Directorate-General for Taxation and Customs Union (TAXUD)
3_api_store_eu_institutions.scope: All measures relating to tariff, commercial and agricultural legislation
3_api_store_eu_institutions.cost: FREE (for both commercial and non-commercial projects)
3_api_store_eu_institutions.current_status: Last updated December 14, 2018 - may need validation for current availability
3_api_store_eu_institutions.limitation: Early access model - requires contacting API Store team for full documentation and authentication details

available_apis.description: Machine-readable SPARQL endpoint for querying RDF triple store synchronized with CKAN repository
Package search API for dataset discovery - returns JSON results
For creating, updating, and deleting datasets

4_data_europa_eu_portal.note: SPARQL endpoint suitable for complex queries but may not be optimized for bulk tariff code downloads

available_files.name: European TARIC/10 Nomenclature
available_files.content: Complete list of 10-digit TARIC codes with nomenclature descriptions

1_circabc_excel_downloads.data_structure: Excel files contain nomenclature descriptions valid at extraction time

data_types.content: EU-wide commodity code information with 10-digit TARIC codes and base tables

distribution_types.description: Complete database dumps with all tariff data
Incremental updates containing only changes from previous day

2_swedish_customs_file_distribution.access: HTTPS service - users can download directly
2_swedish_customs_file_distribution.advantage: Machine-readable XML format suitable for automated processing
2_swedish_customs_file_distribution.includes: National customs measures and EU-wide data

3_ec_tariff_consultation.note: Primary tool for manual lookups - not suitable for bulk automated downloads

tariff_number_com.features: All customs tariff numbers and harmonized codes from EU external trade statistics

github_open_source.description: Java Swing GUI to export TARIC codes to CSV
Utility program for importing EU Product Codes from Swedish Customs TARIC system

option_1_recommended.method: Swedish Customs XML Distribution + ViaEurope API
steps: Parse XML file to extract all 10-digit TARIC codes
Use ViaEurope API (/tariffs endpoint) for validation and enrichment if needed
Cost: FREE (for downloads) + potential cost for API key (unclear pricing)
advantages: Single source of truth for all codes
option_1_recommended.processing_time: XML parsing should take minutes for 15,000-20,000 codes

steps: Download European TARIC/10 Nomenclature XLS file
Parse Excel file using programming language (Python, Node.js, etc.)
Optional: Validate codes via ViaEurope API
disadvantages: Excel format less ideal for automated processing

option_3_api_only.description: Query API for each code sequentially
disadvantages: Inefficient - would require ~15,000-20,000 individual API calls
option_3_api_only.use_case: Only suitable for looking up specific codes, not bulk download

data_structure_after_extraction.example: Cotton T-shirts, knitted or crocheted, for women or girls

technical_implementation_notes.applicable_to_all_27_eu_states: Yes - TARIC is unified EU system. Same codes and duties apply across Austria, Belgium, Bulgaria, Croatia, Cyprus, Czech Republic, Denmark, Estonia, Finland, France, Germany, Greece, Hungary, Ireland, Italy, Latvia, Lithuania, Luxembourg, Malta, Netherlands, Poland, Portugal, Romania, Slovakia, Slovenia, Spain, and Sweden.

data_quality_and_coverage.completeness: 15,000-20,000 unique 10-digit TARIC codes covering all product categories
data_quality_and_coverage.coverage: All 27 EU member states use identical TARIC codes
data_quality_and_coverage.data_sources: European Commission (Directorate-General for Taxation and Customs Union)
data_quality_and_coverage.reliability: Official government database - highest level of reliability

viaeurope_api.authentication_status: Requires API key - test without key returned no output

bulk_download_sources: https://circabc.europa.eu - TARIC & Quota Data and Information group

conclusions.best_method_for_bulk_download: Swedish Customs XML file distribution (https://distr.tullverket.se/tulltaxan) - FREE, complete, machine-readable, daily updates
conclusions.best_method_for_api_queries: ViaEurope API - Well-documented, REST-based, JSON responses, daily sync with EU database
conclusions.implementation_effort: Low to Medium - XML parsing simple in any programming language
conclusions.estimated_completion_time: All 15,000-20,000 codes downloadable in < 1 hour after implementation
conclusions.data_uniformity: All 27 EU member states use identical TARIC codes and structure
